query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'xp_transactions';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'xp_transactions';
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int	int(11)
teamMemberId	int	int(11)
amount	int	int(11)
reason	enum	enum('graded_call','grade_bonus','improvement','badge_earned','streak_milestone')
description	varchar	varchar(255)
callId	int	int(11)
badgeId	int	int(11)
createdAt	timestamp	timestamp
